allow: PowerShell($url = "https://image.pollinations.ai/prompt/A%20blue%20square%20on%20white%20background?width=1600&height=900&nologo=true&model=flux"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -Method GET -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Host "Status:" $r.StatusCode "ContentType:" $r.Headers["Content-Type"] "Size:" $r.RawContentLength } catch { Write-Host "Error:" $_.Exception.Message })
